mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_coupons(user_id, source_challenge_id, discount_rate, expires_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sourceChallengeId}, #{discountRate}, #{expiresAt})
mapper.select: SELECT uc.coupon_id, uc.user_id, uc.source_challenge_id, uc.discount_rate, uc.status, uc.issued_at, uc.expires_at, uc.used_at, uc.used_order_id, c.title AS source_challenge_title FROM user_coupons uc LEFT JOIN challenges c ON uc.source_challenge_id = c.challenge_id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY (uc.status = 'ISSUED') DESC, uc.issued_at DESC

SELECT coupon_id, user_id, source_challenge_id, discount_rate, status, issued_at, expires_at, used_at, used_order_id FROM user_coupons WHERE coupon_id = #{couponId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ISSUED' AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at >= NOW())
